basics.name: Yury Zakharov
basics.label: Senior Backend Software Engineer (.NET)
basics.summary:
Senior backend software engineer with more than 30 years of professional experience and continuous specialization in the .NET ecosystem since its initial release. Extensive hands-on expertise in C#, including long-term ownership, evolution, and modernization of large, business-critical, regulated systems operating at market-leading scale across the UK, Australia, and the USA.
Strongly opinionated about software quality, correctness, and system design. Works in a declarative,
functional-inspired style, applying concepts drawn from functional programming to production C# code to improve domain clarity, determinism, and long-term maintainability. Emphasizes explicit domain modeling, verification-friendly designs, and requirement-driven development over ad hoc or patch-oriented solutions.
Approaches software development systematically: new functionality is designed in the context of the existing system, and defects are addressed through root-cause analysis and structural improvements to prevent recurrence. Particularly effective in legacy modernization initiatives, balancing evolutionary change with operational stability in regulated environments.
Acts as a technical leader within teams, improving developer productivity, tooling, and engineering practices, and mentoring other engineers. Prefers senior individual-contributor and technical leadership roles focused on architectural integrity and long-term system health rather than formal people management.

work.description: Intelliflo is the UK’s leading provider of financial advice software, empowering firms to streamline advice journeys, engage clients, and grow their business.
highlights: Introduced an enforced contract-first development workflow. That eliminated ambiguity in the internal and external API's.
Extended in-house DSL by adding SQL backend. That allowed use of wider range of ORMs and lowered the entry threshold for developers.
Formalised and developed Swagger/OpenAPI based approaches to integration tests. This allowed us to get rid of irrelevant tests (about 10%) and stabilised tests.

work.description: A legal industry leader with global capabilities.
work.summary:
Integrating new Document Management System with existing infrastructure to replace outdated
DMS.

Maintaining existing trading applications (Gas and Energy trading), using C#, WCF, ASP.NET
RESTful services, RabbitMQ, MS SQL Server, Entity Framework, WPF, SpecFlow.
Maintenance includes
Introducing new features according to business requirements
Fixing software defects
Decreasing technical debt and increasing code quality by employing refactoring techniques and
static analysis tools like SonarQube and ReSharper
Improving testability
Integrating with industry standard systems like Xoserve Gemini and OpenLink Endur

Being a part of agile development team contributed to most areas of the project – integration with
external and internal systems, desktop applications, back-end services.
Working on this project, I had a good opportunity on researching and practical use of cutting-age
technology features as well as the financial area.
Being a part of agile development team worked actively on the promotion of coding standards and
improving the code quality.
Introduced and evolved Continuous Integration solution based on MS TFS.
Key Projects:
Halo Financial Online Dealing Platform:
R&D at PoC stage
Integration with Barclays FX platform using FIX protocol (FIX 4.2)
Integration with existing bespoke CRM system
Design and implementation of ETL process
Development of the back-end Web services using WCF framework
Development of monitoring tools for Online Dealing Platform
Development of Desktop applications using WPF and MVVM frameworks
Development of data storage solution using MS SQL Server
Maintaining existing code employing refactoring techniques
Writing unit tests using NUnit ()
Writing integration tests
Close interaction and cooperation with dealers and settlement teams, back-office team.
highlights: Integrated client-facing online application with bank FX platform (FIX 4.2) resulting in reducing the time between clients order and backing transaction from minutes to milliseconds, mitigating the risk of fast market movements.
Automated manual reconciliation of system data with banking data (using SWIFT) resulting in the task being completed with 95% accuracy in seconds, as opposed to hours of manual work.
Migrated client base from outdated bespoke CRM to Microsoft Dynamics CRM resulting in sanitising clients data and providing more productive client management solution.
Designed Continuous Integration solution resulting in reducing the risk of errors in production environment and overheads across the development and deployment process.

work.description: Risk management, Insurance, Reinsurance, Financial services consulting.
work.summary:
Being a part of agile development team contributed to all areas of the project – web application,
desktop applications, back-end services.
Working on this project, I had a good opportunity on researching and practical use of cutting-age
technology features.
Being a part of agile development team worked actively on the promotion of coding standards and
improving the code quality.
Key Projects:
Towers Watson Unify(http://www.towerswatson.com/en-GB/Services/Tools/towers-watson-unify):
R&D at PoC stage
Development of the Web applications using AngularJS framework
Development of Desktop applications using WPF and MVVM frameworks
Development of back-end applications using MS WF framework
Development of data storage solution using MS SQL Server
Development of web-services
Development of pluggable modules for integration with other Towers Watson products
Integration with MS Azure platform
Maintaining existing code employing refactoring techniques
Writing unit tests using NUnit (code coverage is about 80%)
Writing integration tests
Close interaction and cooperation with QA team.

Working at R&D unit, I had a good opportunity on improving UX and UI aspects of the existing
software.
Working at R&D unit, I had a good opportunity on researching and practical use of cutting-age
technology features.
Working at R&D unit, I have researched the possibility of using BDD approach (SpecFlow) in
existing projects.
Implementing new features for existing software according to the customer requirements and new
technological demands.
Being a part of agile development team worked actively on the promotion of coding standards and
improving the code quality.
Key Projects:
Tribold EPM and Product Catalog (http://www.sigma-systems.com/products_epm.htm):
Development of Windows desktop version of Tribold EPM using WPF, Prism, Entity
Framework, C#, LINQ, Windows Workflow
Maintaining existing code employing refactoring techniques
Development of stored procedures for MS SQL Server 2012
Design the architecture for the web version of Tribold EPM
Development of web client for Tribold EPM using Typescript, Knockout.js, JQuery
Research of using alternative frameworks, like Funscript, to build the web client
Development of web services infrastructure for the Tribold EPM using WCF (RESTful),
ASP.NET MVC, C#, LINQ
Implementing TDD approach using MSTest and JUnit for creating unit tests.
Tribold CPQ - Configure Price Quote services engine (http://www.sigma-systems.com/products_cpq.htm):
Design the architecture and API for the Tribold CPQ
Design database structure for Tribold CPQ (MS SQL Server 2012)
Implementation of web services using WCF and C#, Entity Framework, LINQ, PLINQ.
Implementing TDD approach using MSTest for creating unit tests.

Maintaining existing applications.
Design and implementation of new bespoke software.
Redesign and evolvement of existing applications using WCF/WPF technology. The company
now is renewing the set of its products and my main concern is creating reach client application for
broadcasting systems that allows composition of broadcast playlists. The application is built on
WPF technology using C# 4.0 and MVVM design pattern (Microsoft Patterns & Practices Prism
library).
Improving development quality.
highlights: introduced and set UP automated build system. This system was integrated with SVN and used Cruise Control tool to build planned releases of software and install and test them on the staging environment. This reduced release times from days to hours

work.summary:
Designed and implemented Enterprise Message Bus infrastructure and services to replace old
infrastructure. Message Bus was built on WCF technology (C#3.5) to facilitate connectivity
between branches and processing centre. This infrastructure is scalable, highly available business
critical system with low latency requirement.
Implemented client applications for new Enterprise Message Bus structure. Two kinds of
applications were developed - Point of Sale software and application for composing the drawings
of the lottery with analytical reports viewer and online data monitoring. This was built using WPF
(C# 3.5)
Responsible for writing detailed technical specifications from high-level business specifications.

Working throughout the software lifecycle, developing and testing software based on
specifications and writing test scenarios.
highlights: Designed and implemented of Enterprise Analytical reports using MS Analysis Services. This solution made it possible to quantify the work of sports analysts.

work.description: Atalan is a Franco-Russian web agency based in Moscow
work.summary:
Involved in all aspects of the software lifecycle from analysis, design, and development and testing
of software prior to installation.
Working within a Microsoft development environment, specialised in C#, ASP.NET and SQL
Server technologies.
Along with being Database Developer in several projects working as Database Administrator of
company’s internal Databases.
Providing customers with advisory services regarding Databases.

Developing the global monitoring system for food distribution in Moscow, was responsible for
Database and Data Warehouse design and implementation.

work.description: The RBC group of companies is one of the leading Russian media holdings.
work.position: Senior Programmer, System Analyst, Database Developer
work.summary:
Senior Programmer and Database developer in Research and Development department.
As a System Analyst participated in several large projects for Government and Business
customers.
Participated in maintenance and development of internal ERP system
Attended to internal Quality Management courses.

Managed, maintained and developed data-feed and trading software.
Designed and implemented back-office reporting applications.

Accountant application for profit calculation and money movements tracking in the commercial
bank. Participated in complete development cycle.
Bank / Client and Bank / Correspondent system. Participation - Database design, developing of the
server-side of the application.
Information system for online multifactor analysis of information from Stock Exchanges, trader’s
instruments, "virtual trader", decision-making system. Participation – development team leader.
System for gathering, storing and analysis of information from Stock Exchange. Now System is
adapted and used in Central Institute of Aerodynamics, Zhukovsky, Russia. Participation -
Database design, user interface, and visual data representation.
PLS v 2.2 (Personal Learning System). Customer - IBM Eastern Europe / Asia, Moscow.
Participation - enlisted specialist.
Application for profit calculation in the exchange office. Participation - Complete development
cycle.

awards.title: Certified SAFe® 6 Scrum Master
awards.summary: A Certified SAFe® 6 Scrum Master is a SAFe® Scrum Master professional responsible for integrating Scrum practices into an organization. Key areas of competency include using Scrum and Kanban to facilitate team events, supporting program execution, and coaching Agile teams.A Certified SAFe® 6 Scrum Master is a SAFe® Scrum Master professional responsible for integrating Scrum practices into an organization. Key areas of competency include using Scrum and Kanban to facilitate team events, supporting program execution, and coaching Agile teams.
